name: Spira
description: A flash of red ribbon is the last thing most victims of these throwing-daggers see.

components.description: A flash of red ribbon is the last thing most victims of these throwing-daggers see.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Concealed Explosives not dealing explosive damage to nearby enemies when directly hit when equipped on Spira, Kunai, Hikou, Fusilai, or Despair.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Prime: Hotfix 25.3.2 + 25.3.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Improvements to the Gear Spiral controller sensitivity.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed wonky throwing animation when wall hanging and firing any ‘thrown’ weapon (Spira, Kunai, etc).

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tarock Thrown Blade Skin not sitting properly in some cases when equipped on Spira, Spira Prime, or Despair.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tarock Thrown Blade Skin not applying to the Spira Prime or Hikou Prime once thrown.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Gear Spiral items displaying darker than expected when viewed in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Consumables in the higher Gear Spiral Slots than the one you used up becoming unequipped.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: The Profit-Taker - Update 24.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Infinite use items still displaying as usable in the Gear Spiral after they have been removed from your Inventory. They still occupy a slot, but the icon is darkened and the count now displays 0 instead of infinite.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.2 + 24.1.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Echo-Lures no longer need to be equipped in your Gear Spiral, they are auto-equipped in the Conservation gear when a Tranq is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Gear Spiral sometimes not letting you equip more than one item in the same group (i.e. multiple Dragon Keys, etc).

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes: The Gear Spiral now displays RMB instead of TAB to switch to the Emote wheel.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Gear Spiral icons popping in late.
Fixed an issue where if you had 12 or more items in your Gear Spiral, entered the Arsenal, and begin to remove items, the Gear Spiral would not display in ring mode until only 10 items were equipped.
Fixed inability  to remove Emotes from the Gear Spiral while in the Arsenal.
Fixed the Fishing menu displaying Hotkeys beside the slot number even though the Hotkeys only apply to the standard Gear Spiral.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the back button not working when picking Gear Spiral items in the Arsenal.
Fixed a script error when accessing the Gear Spiral.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.3
patchlogs.changes: The Gear Spiral now restricts duplicate Gear items (Apothics, Stims), with the exception of Dragon Keys! The bug turned feature of ability to equip all Dragon Keys shall live to hobble another day!

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Mirage Prime 22.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Saryn Prime, Nikana Prime and Spira Prime have entered the Prime Vault, and their Relics are no longer be obtainable in the game.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of Spiraling Pinnacle, Summit Plunge and Vaulting Apex combos from the Twirling Spire Polearm Stance.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.6.4
patchlogs.changes: The Neo N7 Relic has been introduced into the mix to fix Nekros Prime Systems Blueprint being accidentally vaulted, and the Meso S6 Relic has also been introduced to fix Spira Prime Blade being accidentally vaulted.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Spira and Hikou holsters clipping through Nidus’ legs.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error that could occur in Arsenal with Spira Prime equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a couple Dedicated Server script errors with Volt’s Overload and Spira Prime.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.13
patchlogs.fixes:
Spira Prime crit chance has been increased to 30%.
Spira Prime crit multiplier has been increased to 2.5x.
Fixed Nikana Prime and Spira Prime not appearing in the Codex.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.12: Saryn Prime
patchlogs.fixes: including Saryn Prime, Nikana Prime, Spira Prime, and exclusive cosmetics only available through Prime Access!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Spira’s holsters not having the proper positioning on some Warframes.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Spira not sitting properly on multiple Warframes when holstered.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the bloom FX on Spira / Kunai weapons making it too difficult to aim through the glare.
Fixed the Spira sticking out of its holster when a player switches between weapons.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.5
patchlogs.changes:
Spira Throwing Daggers available now!
Add the Spira Throwing Daggers to your Arsenal by visiting the Market today!

patchlogs.name: Update 13: Dark Sectors
